title: Global crude exports recover in May but Atlantic Basin loses share
section_path: Global crude exports recover in May but Atlantic Basin loses share
section_path_text: Global crude exports recover in May but Atlantic Basin loses share
summary:
Main
Global crude supplies were buoyed in May by an almost 700kbd m-o-m rise in global exports, but total exports are still well below peaks seen last year. Meanwhile, the Atlantic Basin, often touted as a source of growing supply, has been losing market share. By Jay Maroo
Global crude/condensate exports in May stood at just under 42mbd, nearing the levels seen in February and March this year.
